name: Helm of the Dominator
description: The powerful headpiece of a dead necromancer.

abilities.name: Dominate
abilities.description: Takes control of an enemy non-hero unit, elevating its status to a Creep-Hero, and granting it various stat bonuses. Cooldown: 45. Mana Cost: 50. Cast Range: 700. Min Base Health: 1000. Base Attack Damage Bonus: 25. Health Regen Bonus: 12.
